DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF JONATHAN GARCIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO INSPECTION DEMAND, SET ONE, TO INSHAN ENTERPRISES INCORPORATED FORM INTERROGATORIES EMPLOYMENT LAW, SET ONE TO INSHAN ENTERPRISES AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE TO INSHAN ENTERPRISES, AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST INSHAN ENTERPRISES AND ITS ATTORNEY DAX CRAVEN IS HEARD THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OPPOSITION FILED, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE MOTION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT INSHAN ENTERPRISES INC. DBA AL-HAMRA INDIAN & PAKISTANI RESTAURANT SHALL SERVE CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S INSPECTION DEMAND, FORM INTERROGATORIES-EMPLOYMENT LAW, AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES WITHIN 15 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY SANCTIONS TO PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,147.50. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2019 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-12-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-30-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Inspection Demand, Set One, To Inshan Enterprises Inc; Form Interrogatoriesemployment Law, Set One To Inshan Enterprises Inc; And Special Interrogatories, Set One To Inshan Enterprises Inc; And For Monetary Sanctions Against Inshan Enterprises Inc And Its Attorney Dax Craven
Off Calendar Mar-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Dean Royer, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff and Moving party Jonathan Garcia (415) 795 1475
No appearance by Defendants. No opposition was filed.

PLAINTIFF JONATHAN GARCIA's Motion To Compel Responses To Inspection Demand, Set One, To Inshan Enterprises Incorporated Form Interrogatories employment Law, Set One To Inshan Enterprises and Special Interrogatories, Set One To Inshan Enterprises, And For Monetary Sanctions Against Inshan Enterprises and Its Attorney Dax Craven is heard this day. There being no appearance nor an opposition filed, the Court adopts its Tentative Ruling.

The Motion is GRANTED. Defendant Inshan Enterprises Inc. dba al-Hamra Indian & Pakistani Restaurant shall serve code compliant responses to Plaintiff's Inspection Demand, Form Interrogatories-Employment Law, and Special Interrogatories within 15 days of entry of this order. Defendant shall pay sanctions to Plaintiff in the amount of $1,147.50. Order signed in open court.

Judge Pro-tem: Thomas A. Cohen; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2015 Set For Trial On Jul-25-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
